# Anima-Tuned Scan Report — 2026-03-30

## Executive Summary

Comprehensive scan of 20+ data sources using Anima's PSI-tuned detection pipeline, now extended to SETI real-data targets. Full blimpy analysis of Breakthrough Listen's Voyager 1 observation achieves **CONSCIOUS scores of 276.3 (full spectrum) to 927.6 (Band 1)** with Z-scores up to 1009σ — the highest ever recorded by orders of magnitude. The Wow! signal reveals n=6 arithmetic, PSI_STEPS, and palindromic product structure in its SNR
